requests.text: Use whichever runtime tools are appropriate to inspect the retained Vicuna runtime surfaces and summarize the two most important operational differences between standard and experimental mode.
Inspect the local Vicuna docs or runtime knowledge and explain how Telegram text delivery and follow-up emotive video delivery are sequenced for one turn.
Use the host-owned skills or hard-memory surfaces if needed and explain how a future decode controller training pass would consume data from transitions, decode traces, and emotive traces.
